initial_candidates.sql:
WITH sales_2019 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2019
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN promotions p ON s.promo_id = p.promo_id
    JOIN channels c ON s.channel_id = c.channel_id
    JOIN customers cust ON s.cust_id = cust.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON cust.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2019
      AND p.promo_total_id = 1
      AND c.channel_total_id = 1
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
sales_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2020
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN promotions p ON s.promo_id = p.promo_id
    JOIN channels c ON s.channel_id = c.channel_id
    JOIN customers cust ON s.cust_id = cust.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON cust.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2020
      AND p.promo_total_id = 1
      AND c.channel_total_id = 1
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
growth_rates AS (
    SELECT 
        s19.prod_id,
        s19.calendar_month_number,
        CASE 
            WHEN s19.amount_sold_2019 = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (s20.amount_sold_2020 - s19.amount_sold_2019) * 1.0 / s19.amount_sold_2019
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM sales_2019 s19
    LEFT JOIN sales_2020 s20 
        ON s19.prod_id = s20.prod_id 
        AND s19.calendar_month_number = s20.calendar_month_number
),
projected_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        gr.prod_id,
        gr.calendar_month_number,
        CASE 
            WHEN gr.growth_rate IS NULL THEN 0
            ELSE (SELECT s.amount_sold 
                  FROM sales s
                  JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
                  JOIN promotions p ON s.promo_id = p.promo_id
                  JOIN channels c ON s.channel_id = c.channel_id
                  JOIN customers cust ON s.cust_id = cust.cust_id
                  JOIN countries co ON cust.country_id = co.country_id
                  WHERE t.calendar_year = 2020
                    AND p.promo_total_id = 1
                    AND c.channel_total_id = 1
                    AND co.country_name = 'France'
                    AND s.prod_id = gr.prod_id
                    AND t.calendar_month_number = gr.calendar_month_number
            ) * (1 + gr.growth_rate)
        END AS projected_amount
    FROM growth_rates gr
),
sales_2021_projected AS (
    SELECT 
        p.calendar_month_number,
        p.projected_amount * cu.to_us AS amount_sold_usd
    FROM projected_2021 p
    JOIN currency cu 
        ON cu.country = 'France' 
        AND cu.year = 2021 
        AND cu.month = p.calendar_month_number
)
SELECT 
    calendar_month_number,
    AVG(amount_sold_usd) AS avg_projected_monthly_sales_usd
FROM sales_2021_projected
GROUP BY calendar_month_number
ORDER BY calendar_month_number ASC;

WITH sales_2019 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2019
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2019
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
sales_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2020
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2020
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
growth_rates AS (
    SELECT 
        s19.prod_id,
        s19.calendar_month_number,
        CASE 
            WHEN s19.amount_sold_2019 = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (s20.amount_sold_2020 - s19.amount_sold_2019) * 1.0 / s19.amount_sold_2019
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM sales_2019 s19
    JOIN sales_2020 s20 
        ON s19.prod_id = s20.prod_id 
        AND s19.calendar_month_number = s20.calendar_month_number
),
sales_2020_with_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        s20.prod_id,
        s20.calendar_month_number,
        s20.amount_sold_2020,
        gr.growth_rate
    FROM sales_2020 s20
    JOIN growth_rates gr 
        ON s20.prod_id = gr.prod_id 
        AND s20.calendar_month_number = gr.calendar_month_number
),
sales_2021_projected AS (
    SELECT 
        s20g.prod_id,
        s20g.calendar_month_number,
        s20g.amount_sold_2020 * (1 + s20g.growth_rate) AS amount_sold_2021,
        cur.to_us
    FROM sales_2020_with_growth s20g
    JOIN currency cur 
        ON cur.country = 'France' 
        AND cur.year = 2021 
        AND cur.month = s20g.calendar_month_number
    WHERE s20g.growth_rate IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_sales_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        sp.prod_id,
        sp.calendar_month_number,
        sp.amount_sold_2021 * sp.to_us AS amount_sold_usd
    FROM sales_2021_projected sp
    JOIN sales s ON s.prod_id = sp.prod_id AND s.time_id = (
        SELECT t.time_id 
        FROM times t 
        WHERE t.calendar_year = 2021 
          AND t.calendar_month_number = sp.calendar_month_number
        LIMIT 1
    )
    JOIN promotions p ON s.promo_id = p.promo_id
    JOIN channels ch ON s.channel_id = ch.channel_id
    WHERE p.promo_total_id = 1
      AND ch.channel_total_id = 1
)
SELECT 
    calendar_month_number,
    AVG(amount_sold_usd) AS avg_projected_monthly_sales_usd
FROM filtered_sales_2021
GROUP BY calendar_month_number
ORDER BY calendar_month_number ASC;

WITH sales_2019 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2019
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN promotions pr ON s.promo_id = pr.promo_id
    JOIN channels ch ON s.channel_id = ch.channel_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2019
      AND pr.promo_total_id = 1
      AND ch.channel_total_id = 1
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
sales_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2020
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN promotions pr ON s.promo_id = pr.promo_id
    JOIN channels ch ON s.channel_id = ch.channel_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2020
      AND pr.promo_total_id = 1
      AND ch.channel_total_id = 1
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
growth AS (
    SELECT 
        s2019.prod_id,
        s2019.calendar_month_number,
        s2019.amount_sold_2019,
        s2020.amount_sold_2020,
        CASE 
            WHEN s2019.amount_sold_2019 = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (s2020.amount_sold_2020 - s2019.amount_sold_2019) * 1.0 / s2019.amount_sold_2019
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM sales_2019 s2019
    JOIN sales_2020 s2020 
        ON s2019.prod_id = s2020.prod_id 
        AND s2019.calendar_month_number = s2020.calendar_month_number
),
projected_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        g.prod_id,
        g.calendar_month_number,
        g.amount_sold_2020 * (1 + g.growth_rate) AS amount_sold_projected,
        c.to_us
    FROM growth g
    JOIN currency c 
        ON c.country = 'France' 
        AND c.year = 2021 
        AND c.month = g.calendar_month_number
),
amounts_usd AS (
    SELECT 
        calendar_month_number,
        amount_sold_projected * to_us AS amount_sold_usd
    FROM projected_2021
)
SELECT 
    calendar_month_number,
    AVG(amount_sold_usd) AS avg_projected_monthly_sales_usd
FROM amounts_usd
GROUP BY calendar_month_number
ORDER BY calendar_month_number ASC;

WITH sales_2019 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number AS month,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2019
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2019
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
sales_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number AS month,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2020
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2020
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
growth_rates AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(s19.prod_id, s20.prod_id) AS prod_id,
        COALESCE(s19.month, s20.month) AS month,
        CASE 
            WHEN s19.amount_sold_2019 IS NULL OR s19.amount_sold_2019 = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (s20.amount_sold_2020 - s19.amount_sold_2019) / s19.amount_sold_2019
        END AS growth_rate,
        COALESCE(s20.amount_sold_2020, 0) AS amount_sold_2020,
        COALESCE(s19.amount_sold_2019, 0) AS amount_sold_2019
    FROM sales_2019 s19
    FULL OUTER JOIN sales_2020 s20 
        ON s19.prod_id = s20.prod_id AND s19.month = s20.month
),
sales_2021_projected AS (
    SELECT 
        gr.prod_id,
        t21.calendar_month_number AS month,
        gr.amount_sold_2020 * (1 + gr.growth_rate) AS amount_sold_2021,
        cur.to_us AS exchange_rate,
        gr.amount_sold_2020 * (1 + gr.growth_rate) * cur.to_us AS amount_sold_usd
    FROM growth_rates gr
    JOIN times t21 ON t21.calendar_month_number = gr.month
    JOIN currency cur ON cur.year = 2021 AND cur.month = gr.month
    JOIN customers c ON c.cust_id IS NOT NULL -- placeholder to join countries
    JOIN countries co ON co.country_id = c.country_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'France'
),
filtered_sales_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        s21.prod_id,
        s21.month,
        s21.amount_sold_usd
    FROM sales_2021_projected s21
    JOIN sales s ON s.prod_id = s21.prod_id AND s.time_id IN (
        SELECT time_id FROM times WHERE calendar_year = 2021 AND calendar_month_number = s21.month
    )
    JOIN promotions p ON s.promo_id = p.promo_id AND p.promo_total_id = 1
    JOIN channels ch ON s.channel_id = ch.channel_id AND ch.channel_total_id = 1
)
SELECT 
    fp.month,
    AVG(fp.amount_sold_usd) AS avg_projected_monthly_sales_usd
FROM filtered_sales_2021 fp
GROUP BY fp.month
ORDER BY fp.month ASC;

WITH sales_2019 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2019
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2019
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
sales_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2020
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2020
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
growth_rates AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(s19.prod_id, s20.prod_id) AS prod_id,
        COALESCE(s19.calendar_month_number, s20.calendar_month_number) AS calendar_month_number,
        CASE 
            WHEN s19.amount_sold_2019 IS NULL OR s19.amount_sold_2019 = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (s20.amount_sold_2020 - s19.amount_sold_2019) * 1.0 / s19.amount_sold_2019
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM sales_2019 s19
    FULL OUTER JOIN sales_2020 s20 
        ON s19.prod_id = s20.prod_id 
        AND s19.calendar_month_number = s20.calendar_month_number
),
projected_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        s20.prod_id,
        s20.calendar_month_number,
        s20.amount_sold_2020 * (1 + COALESCE(gr.growth_rate, 0)) AS amount_sold_projected,
        c.to_us
    FROM sales_2020 s20
    JOIN growth_rates gr 
        ON s20.prod_id = gr.prod_id 
        AND s20.calendar_month_number = gr.calendar_month_number
    JOIN countries co ON co.country_name = 'France'
    JOIN currency c 
        ON c.country = co.country_name 
        AND c.year = 2021 
        AND c.month = s20.calendar_month_number
),
filtered_projected AS (
    SELECT 
        p.calendar_month_number,
        p.amount_sold_projected * p.to_us AS amount_sold_usd
    FROM projected_2021 p
    JOIN sales s 
        ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id 
        AND s.time_id IN (SELECT time_id FROM times WHERE calendar_year = 2021 AND calendar_month_number = p.calendar_month_number)
    JOIN promotions pr ON s.promo_id = pr.promo_id
    JOIN channels ch ON s.channel_id = ch.channel_id
    WHERE pr.promo_total_id = 1
      AND ch.channel_total_id = 1
)
SELECT 
    calendar_month_number,
    AVG(amount_sold_usd) AS avg_projected_monthly_sales_usd
FROM filtered_projected
GROUP BY calendar_month_number
ORDER BY calendar_month_number ASC;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH sales_2019 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2019
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2019
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
sales_2020 AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        t.calendar_month_number,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS amount_sold_2020
    FROM sales s
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    WHERE t.calendar_year = 2020
      AND co.country_name = 'France'
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, t.calendar_month_number
),
growth_rates AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(s19.prod_id, s20.prod_id) AS prod_id,
        COALESCE(s19.calendar_month_number, s20.calendar_month_number) AS calendar_month_number,
        CASE 
            WHEN s19.amount_sold_2019 IS NULL OR s19.amount_sold_2019 = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (s20.amount_sold_2020 - s19.amount_sold_2019) * 1.0 / s19.amount_sold_2019
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM sales_2019 s19
    FULL OUTER JOIN sales_2020 s20 
        ON s19.prod_id = s20.prod_id 
        AND s19.calendar_month_number = s20.calendar_month_number
),
projected_2021 AS (
    SELECT 
        s20.prod_id,
        s20.calendar_month_number,
        s20.amount_sold_2020 * (1 + COALESCE(gr.growth_rate, 0)) AS amount_sold_projected,
        c.to_us
    FROM sales_2020 s20
    JOIN growth_rates gr 
        ON s20.prod_id = gr.prod_id 
        AND s20.calendar_month_number = gr.calendar_month_number
    JOIN countries co ON co.country_name = 'France'
    JOIN currency c 
        ON c.country = co.country_name 
        AND c.year = 2021 
        AND c.month = s20.calendar_month_number
),
filtered_projected AS (
    SELECT 
        p.calendar_month_number,
        p.amount_sold_projected * p.to_us AS amount_sold_usd
    FROM projected_2021 p
    JOIN sales s 
        ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id 
        AND s.time_id IN (SELECT time_id FROM times WHERE calendar_year = 2021 AND calendar_month_number = p.calendar_month_number)
    JOIN promotions pr ON s.promo_id = pr.promo_id
    JOIN channels ch ON s.channel_id = ch.channel_id
    WHERE pr.promo_total_id = 1
      AND ch.channel_total_id = 1
)
SELECT 
    calendar_month_number,
    AVG(amount_sold_usd) AS avg_projected_monthly_sales_usd
FROM filtered_projected
GROUP BY calendar_month_number
ORDER BY calendar_month_number ASC;
